3000.description: Kottakkal Ayurvedic Center is a traditional and complementary medicine centre in Al Mankhool, Dubai, offering Ayurvedic consultations, herbal therapy, and holistic wellness treatments to patients from across the city. Patients rate it 4.7 stars from 281 Google reviews. Treatments include panchakarma detox therapy, Ayurvedic massage, herbal consultations, and lifestyle guidance based on traditional Keralan medicine principles. Licensed and regulated by DHA (Dubai Health Authority). The facility can be reached at +971 55 610 3056. The centre is staffed by qualified TCAM practitioners registered with DHA, ensuring treatments meet the regulatory requirements set for complementary medicine in Dubai.
reviewSummary: Practitioners explain each Ayurvedic treatment in detail and adjust plans to the individual patient's needs.
The herbal formulations are authentic and patients notice real improvements in energy and digestion over time.
Appointments run on schedule and the centre is clean, calm, and staffed by knowledgeable TCAM practitioners.
Many patients return regularly for panchakarma and find the results consistent across multiple sessions.
Staff are multilingual, making patients from South Asian and Arab backgrounds equally comfortable.
